calls.notes: Functional updater: prevState.viewMode === 'grid' ? 'list' : 'grid'. Pure state flip — no side effects, no API call, no persistence.

renderedBy.notes: viewMode is read from this.state inside render(). The container div at line 1026 switches between styles.grid and styles.list. The per-document renderer at line 1028 switches between this.renderCard(doc) and this.renderListRow(doc). The toggle button style at line 997 switches between styles.viewToggleActive and styles.viewToggle.
